notes: ET: Legacy engine, idTech3 rcon (one connectionless UDP packet on the game port, gated only by rconpassword). Query patterns verified live against etlegacy/server with omni-bots connected. The `players` query's `raw` field carries the rcon `status` reply, which includes an address column with player IPs — visible only to an operator who already has rcon. Player names are returned with their ^-colour codes intact; the sidecar does not strip them.

commands.name: change_map
commands.description: Load a map immediately (e.g. oasis, goldrush).

commands.name: kick_slot
commands.description: Kick a player by their status slot number.

commands.name: say
commands.description: Broadcast a server message to everyone.

queries.name: server_info
queries.description: Server name, current map, gametype and slot count, from the rcon serverinfo reply.

queries.name: players
queries.description: Connected players (slot, score, ping, name) from the rcon status table. Humans and bots both appear; names keep their ^-colour codes.
